$comment: Agent Card for the Gatekeeper Agent — aligned with the A2A AgentCard and ERC-8004 agent-card shapes so it can be resolved by A2A clients, ERC-8004 registries, and Web Bot Auth verifiers (all protocols the Terminal 3 ADK targets).
name: Gatekeeper Agent
description: Executes permissioned financial actions on behalf of a user without holding their credentials or data: a BBS+ verifiable-credential eligibility gate plus a hardware-enforced TEE mandate, with per-action audit.

skills.name: Eligibility-gated permissioned action
skills.description: Verify the user is eligible via a BBS+ credential, then enforce a spending mandate (amount, asset, kind, counterparty, time window) inside a Terminal 3 TEE contract before any action is allowed.
examples: Prove I'm an accredited investor without revealing my net worth, then buy up to $5,000 of USDC RWA from an approved counterparty.

registrations.note: Trustless Agents identity (ERC-721 agent card) — registration is on the roadmap; this file is the resolvable card.
This document doubles as the A2A AgentCard.
RFC 9421 HTTP Message Signatures for outbound action requests — on the roadmap.

execution.attestation: verifyTdxQuote; REPORT_DATA bound to the ML-KEM session key

t3n-session.description: Encrypted, attested TEE session opened via T3nClient.handshake().
